source_tables.table_purpose: Semaglutide overweight/obesity trial (NN9536-4373): Screening, Randomisation (V2/week 0), Dose escalation period, Maintenance period, End of treatment (V24/week 68), End of trial (V25/week 75).

property_hierarchy.property_comment: Top header band: Screening (V1), Randomisation (V2), Dose escalation period (V3-V10, merged), Maintenance period (P11-P23, merged), End of treatment (V24), End of trial (V25). Landscape/rotated flowchart; visits run as columns. Row-label cell (col 1) blank so property_name synthesized.
Visit identifiers V1..V25; 'V'=clinic visit, 'P'=phone contact. Label from source col-1 cell.
Nominal visit weeks: -1 (screening) through 75 (end of trial). Label from source.
Permitted visit windows in days: '-7 to 0' (screening), '±0' (V2 randomisation), '±3' most visits, '0 to +5' (end of trial). Label from source.

Top header band: Screening (V1), Randomisation (V2), Dose escalation period (V3-V10, merged), Maintenance period (P11-P23, merged), End of treatment (V24), End of trial (V25). Landscape/rotated flowchart; visits run as columns. Row-label cell (col 1) blank so property_name synthesized.
Visit identifiers V1..V25; 'V'=clinic visit, 'P'=phone contact. Label from source col-1 cell.
Nominal visit weeks: -1 (screening) through 75 (end of trial). Label from source.
Permitted visit windows in days: '-7 to 0' (screening), '±0' (V2 randomisation), '±3' most visits, '0 to +5' (end of trial). Label from source.

unified_annotations.annotation_text: Demography consists of date of birth, sex, ethnicity, and race (according to local regulation).
Smoking is defined as smoking at least one cigarette or equivalent daily.
DEXA scan is performed in a sub-population.
DEXA scan should be performed in fasting state prior to randomisation (after informed consent is obtained).
Only for subjects where the separate informed consent for future research has been signed.
Fasting at V25 is defined as at least 2 hours without food and drink intake except water before attending the visit.
